segment.source: A privacy block rendering a heading, rich-text intro, a fixed embedded TYPO3 data-request form, and an optional privacy note beneath it. Use it for: GDPR subject-access sections, passages like 'request, export, or delete your data' in privacy policies, data-rights and compliance contact sections. Prefer 'Contact Form Block' for general enquiries; use 'Privacy Notice' for policy text without a form.
